series_metadata.series_title: Correspondence and administrative documents related to variances and exemptions
series_metadata.series_description: All documents relating to application and issuance or denial of requests for variances from classification as a waste (OAC 3745-50-23) and exemptions from the hazardous waste laws (ORC 3734.02(G))except the actual authorized variance or 3734.02(G) exemption request itself.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: final action is issued unless an appeal has been filed. In appeal cases, appeal is finally resolved
